analytics.last_inbound_snippet: Subject: Re: Shalada, I owe you this!\n\nBody: Why am I still getting emails if I cancelled a couple weeks ago. I never received anything showing my cancellation. This is mot good business. I have moved on with a new marketing team. And you

cause_analysis.narrative: Shalada's Beauty Chambers churned on 2026-02-10 after 219 days with Zoca. They sent an explicit cancellation request on 2026-01-23 via app_chat — 18 days before churn. Classification: explicit cancellation. The client formally asked to cancel; the question is whether a save attempt was made.
recommendations: [Retention] Cancellation was signalled 18 day(s) before churn via app_chat. Trigger an AM save call within 4 hours of any cancellation keyword — not a support response.
[Offer] Build a 3-tier retention offer ladder (pause / discount / scope change) so AMs have something concrete to counter with.

As your Client Experience Specialist, my priority is making sure you feel supported and that we work through any concerns you have together. Your experience matters so much to me, and I want to make sure we find the right solution for you.
